title: dysphania littoralis
intro: Dysphania littoralis, also known as sea purslane, is a succulent plant that thrives in coastal areas and is commonly found in Australia, New Zealand, and parts of Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dysphania littoralis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from digestive problems such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
